messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0087",
  "title": "可持续的全链路增长，并不意味着一味加码。掌控投放节奏，做出理性决策",
  "page_index": 48,
  "page_range": "48"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0088",
    "title": "扩量 Scale",
    "page_range": "48",
    "summary": "This section consists solely of the heading \"扩量 Scale\" (Scaling) with no accompanying body text, data, or references. It introduces the general topic of scaling but contains no definitions, procedures, metrics, entities, dates, claims, tables, figures, or evidence. As a result, it cannot answer specific factual, procedural, or analytical questions. For retrieval purposes, this node should be treated as a structural section marker or placeholder indicating where scaling-related content may be located, rather than a source of substantive information."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0089",
    "title": "暂停 Pause",
    "page_range": "48",
    "summary": "This section identifies two operational entities/terms: \"暂停\" (Pause) and \"扩量\" (Scale). It can answer questions regarding the presence or labeling of these specific states or actions within the document. The excerpt does not contain dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. Retrieval queries should focus on keyword matching for these two terms as operational modes or commands."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0090",
    "title": "再投入 Reinvest",
    "page_range": "48-49",
    "summary": "This section can answer questions regarding the identification of three core operational strategies or phases: 再投入 (Reinvest), 暂停 (Pause), and 扩量 (Scale). It functions as a structural heading or categorical index for these topics. The provided text does not contain definitions, procedures, dates, metrics, tables, figures, claims, or evidence types, indicating that detailed explanations, implementation steps, or supporting data for these concepts are located in the surrounding or subsequent content."
  }
]

message.content: This section (page 48) introduces a strategic framework for managing ad placement pacing to achieve sustainable full-link growth without blind investment increases. It structurally organizes three core operational modes: 扩量 (Scale), 暂停 (Pause), and 再投入 (Reinvest). The content functions exclusively as a categorical index or structural heading. It does not contain definitions, procedures, dates, metrics, tables, figures, claims, or evidence types. For retrieval purposes, this node should be treated as a structural marker to locate subsequent or surrounding discussions on these three operational strategies, rather than as a source of substantive factual, procedural, or analytical data.
